title: Glowing Trim Armors
description:
This I present you Glowing Trim Armors pack.
This pack works on renaming the armor
16[13+3] Colours 18 Trims designs
OPtifine required
Series-[a,c,d,e,g,i,l,n,q,r,ch,rs,gb,p,s,m] and add numbers in last 1-18
ex-r1,d16,g4....etc
also shader supported
body:
Glowing Trim Armors Pack

Hello guys!
We meet again 👋

Today, I present to you the Glowing Trim Armors Pack.
This texture pack adds glowing trim designs to armors in Minecraft, giving them a unique and stylish look.

It works smoothly with or without shaders, so anyone can enjoy it across supported versions.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===📌Read Carefully===

=OptiFine is required
=This pack works by renaming the armors
=Includes:
-----13+3 colors
-----18 trim designs
=Applies only to armors
=Just rename the armors to activate effects
=Supported armor types: Iron, Copper, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

=== 🎨Armor Colors [13] ===

| Color Name        | Code |
| ----------------- | ---- |
| Amethyst          | a    |
| Copper            | c    |
| Cherry            | ch   |
| Diamond           | d    |
| Emerald           | e    |
| Gold              | g    |
| Iron              | i    |
| Lapis             | l    |
| Netherite         | n    |
| Quartz            | q    |
| Redstone          | r    |
| Resin             | rs   |
| Prismarine        | p    |

=== 🎨Netherite-Only Colors [+3] ===

| Gilded Blackstone | gb   |
| Magma             | m    |
| Sculk             | s    |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🛡️Trim Designs===

| Design    | Code |
| --------- | ---- |
| Bolt      | 1    |
| Coast     | 2    |
| Dune      | 3    |
| Eye       | 4    |
| Flow      | 5    |
| Host      | 6    |
| Raiser    | 7    |
| Rib       | 8    |
| Sentry    | 9    |
| Shaper    | 10   |
| Silence   | 11   |
| Snout     | 12   |
| Spire     | 13   |
| Tide      | 14   |
| Vex       | 15   |
| Ward      | 16   |
| Wayfinder | 17   |
| Wild      | 18   |

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===⚙️ How to Use===

Rename your armors using a combination of color + design code.

Examples:
r14 , a10 , l6 , g7 , c4 , d16 , l2 , n9 , i3 , q12, ch18 , rs17, p15.

Netherite-only examples:
m5, gb6, s10

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===✨ Changes Applied===

-After applying the pack:

1]Netherite Armor Appearance
2]Diamond Armor Appearance
3]Gold Armor Appearance
4]Iron Armor Appearance
5]Copper Armor Appearance (works from version 1.21.9 and above)
6]GUI

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===⚠️ OptiFine Settings Required===

=Make sure these options are enabled:
---Emissive Textures
---Custom Items

=Otherwise, the pack may not work properly.
---Without OptiFine, the glowing (emissive) effect may not work, or the entire pack may fail.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🔧 Alternative Mods===

=Fabric Mods
---EMF (Entity Model Features)
---ETF (Entity Texture Features)
---Continuity
---CIT Resewn
---Indium

=Forge Mods
---EMF (Entity Model Features)
---ETF (Entity Texture Features)
---Connectedness
---Fusion (Connected Textures)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===❗ Troubleshooting===

-If the pack works the first time but not after reopening Minecraft, reload the texture pack.
-If it doesn’t work the first time—even after following the steps—check your OptiFine version.
-Make sure OptiFine is installed correctly before using the pack.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🌍 Compatibility===

-Works in Singleplayer and Multiplayer
-Supported versions: 1.16 to latest
-Each version has separate files, so check before downloading

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

===🎉 Final Note===

Enjoy the Glowing Trim Armors Pack!

Thanks for downloading ❤️.
